productDisplayName: Nike Men Ballista Black Sports Shoes
description: Sleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Ballista running shoe is replete with comfort and style. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe to wear for runs and Sports. Upper Meshed upper for ample breathability Perforated leather overlays with laced portions on midfoot for structure, midfoot support and ventilation Lace-up system for snug Fit Synthetic laces for durability Padded tongue and collar for enhanced comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Reinforced overlays on heel cup and above toe guard for enhanced durability and protection Midsole Cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection EVA midsole for durability and enhanced shock absorption Padded back sole to lock the foot in place Outsole High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durability Forefoot and backfoot outsole with rectangular lugs and grooves for maximum traction and grip Impact guidance system along the length of the foot for ample impact protection, energy return and propulsion Deep flex groove on mid forefoot for flexible movement Arched midfoot to support the inner arch Forefoot outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe box for enhanced protection to the forefoot Wash care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
